---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the starter kit
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature request in one or two sentences.

## Problem Statement

What limitation, friction, or missing capability does this request address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the ideal behavior or API shape.

## Reusability Check

Explain why this belongs in a generic starter instead of a project-specific implementation.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or existing approaches you evaluated.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, or notes that would help shape the implementation.
